title: Lessons from the Lab — Retrospectives
body: Post-engagement breakdowns from real lab boxes. Each one is a complete chain — recon to root — with timing, the specific decisions that mattered, and the reusable patterns extracted from them. Read these between machines, not during one. The methodology is the asset; the specific CVEs rotate.
warn: These are after-action reports, not technique references. If you're stuck on a live box, use the Jump menu or mindset_stuck. Come back here once the machine is rooted.

choices.label: Vault — AD chain (SMB → NTLMv2 → WriteDacl → DCSync)
